description: Organized crime syndicate based in Hawaii, founded in 1969 by Wilford Pulawa. Controlled criminal activities in Hawaii from the late 1960s to the mid-1990s, involved in illegal gambling, prostitution, racketeering, extortion, and drug trafficking. Extended influence to mainland US states including California and Nevada.

country_links.evidence_quote: the wide-scale illegal trade in Chinese white heroin
country_links.context: The Company engaged in the wide-scale illegal trade in Chinese white heroin, sourcing it from China.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Company was able to exert some of its criminal control into Hawaiian communities on the mainland, mainly in Nevada and California .
country_links.context: The Company exerted criminal control into Hawaiian communities on the mainland, mainly in Nevada and California.
